N

NEVER_RETRY - Enum constant in enum class com.sayanth_ranjith.cheese_retry_core.core.predicate.type.RetryPredicateType
Deprecated.
NeverRetryPredicate - Class in com.sayanth_ranjith.cheese_retry_core.core.predicate
Deprecated.
Prefer not applying @CheeseRetry at all, or use AlwaysRetryPredicate / TypeBasedRetryPredicate to describe explicit retry behavior.
NeverRetryPredicate() - Constructor for class com.sayanth_ranjith.cheese_retry_core.core.predicate.NeverRetryPredicate
Deprecated.
 
nextDelayInMillis(int) - Method in interface com.sayanth_ranjith.cheese_retry_core.core.strategy.BackoffStrategy
Calculates the delay in milliseconds before the next retry attempt.

RetryPolicy - Class in com.sayanth_ranjith.cheese_retry_core.core.policy
Defines a retry policy that governs how and when retry attempts should be made.
RetryPolicyFactory - Class in com.sayanth_ranjith.cheese_retry_core.factory
Factory for building RetryPolicy instances from the CheeseRetry annotation metadata.
RetryPolicyFactory() - Constructor for class com.sayanth_ranjith.cheese_retry_core.factory.RetryPolicyFactory
 
RetryPredicate - Interface in com.sayanth_ranjith.cheese_retry_core.core.predicate
Defines the contract for determining whether a failed operation should be retried based on the exception that was thrown.
